_comment: Starter messages for the role-menu builder (reaction-roles overhaul PR 2, plan §4.6c). Loaded by utils/role_menu_presets.py; a missing/garbled file falls back to the in-code defaults. 'theme' keys into utils/role_menu_presets._THEMES.

templates.name: Blank
templates.title: Pick your roles
templates.description: Select the roles you'd like below.

templates.name: 🎮 Game roles
templates.title: 🎮 Game Roles
templates.description: Pick the games you play to get pinged for squads and find teammates.

templates.name: 🔔 Notification roles
templates.title: 🔔 Notifications
templates.description: Choose which announcements you want to be pinged for.

templates.name: 🎨 Colour roles
templates.title: 🎨 Colour Roles
templates.description: Give yourself a splash of colour — pick a name colour below.

templates.name: 🗣️ Pronoun roles
templates.title: 🗣️ Pronouns
templates.description: Let others know how to refer to you.

templates.name: ✅ Verify to enter
templates.title: ✅ Verify
templates.description: Click below to verify and unlock the rest of the server.
